use_cases: Displaying travel routes with distance and author attribution in a visually appealing card format
Enabling users to like and interact with travel content on social discovery platforms
Showcasing travel experiences with hero imagery and overlay text styling
Adding animated card elements to travel itinerary or trip planning interfaces
Creating shareable travel route previews with social engagement metrics
ai_summary: A travel route card component featuring a background image with overlay, displaying title, author, and distance information with a like button. Built with Framer Motion for hover scale animations and staggered entrance effects. The glass-morphism style combines a frosted overlay with shadow and rounded corners for a modern travel media aesthetic. Includes interactive like functionality with visual state feedback.
